mapper.select:
SELECT id, project_name AS name, train_type, IFNULL(train_sdate, IFNULL(practice_sdate, exam_sdate)) AS startDate, IFNULL(exam_sdate, IFNULL(practice_sdate, train_sdate)) AS endDate, total_course_hours, ( (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT courseware_id) FROM xm_project_person_study_record z WHERE z.project_id = a.id AND status = 2 AND z.person_id = #{personId} and z.is_delete = 0 ) / (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM xm_project_relate x LEFT JOIN xm_course_relation_courseware y ON x.relate_ids = y.course_id LEFT JOIN xm_courseware z ON y.courseware_id = z.id WHERE x.project_id = a.id AND x.is_delete = 0 AND y.is_delete = 0 AND z.is_delete = 0 AND z.type IN (1, 2) AND x.type = 2) ) * 100 AS schedule, (SELECT name FROM xm_project_dict b WHERE a.train_class = b.id) AS trainClassName, IF( (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM xm_person_course_relate c WHERE a.is_delete = 0 AND c.project_id = a.id AND person_id = #{personId} ) > 0, 'true', 'false' ) AS ifAdd, IFNULL( (SELECT is_sign FROM xm_person_course_relate WHERE is_delete = 0 AND person_id = #{personId} AND project_id = a.id ), 1 ) AS status FROM xm_project a WHERE a.is_delete = 0 AND a.train_plan_id = #{trainPlanId} AND a.project_type IN (2, 3)
AND a.project_type = #{projectType}

SELECT a.id, a.train_type, a.project_name name, 'teacher' lecturer, IFNULL(train_sdate, IFNULL(practice_sdate, exam_sdate)) trainSdate, IFNULL(exam_edate, IFNULL(practice_edate, train_edate)) trainEdate, a.remark outline, (SELECT SUM(learn_hours) FROM xm_project_relate x LEFT JOIN xm_course_relation_courseware y ON x.relate_ids = y.course_id LEFT JOIN xm_courseware z ON y.courseware_id = z.id WHERE x.type = 2 AND x.project_id = a.id AND x.is_delete = 0 AND y.is_delete = 0 AND z.is_delete = 0 AND z.type IN (1, 2)) learnHours, (SELECT b.name FROM sys_user b WHERE b.id = a.create_by) AS createName FROM xm_project a WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM xm_person_course_relate a LEFT JOIN xm_project b ON a.project_id = b.id WHERE b.is_delete = 0 AND a.is_delete = 0 AND person_id = #{personId}
AND is_sign in (2,3)
AND is_sign = 3
AND ((b.train_way IN (1, 3) AND a.is_sign = 3) OR (b.train_way IN (2, 4) AND a.is_sign = 3 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM xm_answer_report c WHERE c.is_delete = 0 AND c.project_id = b.id AND c.person_id = a.person_id AND c.score >= b.pass_score)))

select id,org_id,name,year,if(year(now()) = a.year,1,2) state from xm_train_plan a where a.is_delete = 0 and a.year <= year(now()) and a.type = #{type} and exists(select 1 from xm_person p left join sys_org o on p.org_id = o.id where ( o.pids like concat('%[', a.org_id, ']%') or o.id = a.org_id ) and p.id = #{personId}) order by create_time desc
